$comment: Copy to forge.config.json (gitignored). Model registry only — NO secrets. Put API keys in .env. maxContextTokens is a virtual window used for compaction stress-tests (~900K, close to DeepSeek's ~1M); delete the line to use the model's full window.

ssh.$comment: Optional — only needed if you use the built-in ssh tool. Leave password empty to use key-based auth from your ssh-agent.
